name: SOLITARIO RESOURCES CORP.
business: Solitario Resources Corp. is a mineral exploration company that acquires and explores precious metal, zinc, and base metal properties. It seeks to discover economic deposits and advance them to development stage for sale, joint venture, or royalty creation. The company has never developed a mineral property and currently holds interests in projects in Peru, Alaska, South Dakota, and Colorado.

exposures.sentence: Solitario s primary focus is on the acquisition and exploration of precious metal, zinc and other base metal exploration mineral properties.

Because our core assets are currently in zinc, gold and copper related projects, as well as potentially molybdenum at the Cat Creek project, the spot price of these commodities is particularly important to the value of our assets and future prospects.

catalysts.event: Initial two-phase drilling program of 4,000 to 6,000 meters at Golden Crest project
catalysts.sentence: During 2026 Solitario, pending permitting, is planning to conduct an initial two-phase drilling program of 4,000 to 6,000 meters consisting of up to 20 additional exploration core holes in the first phase.

catalysts.event: Limited two to four-hole drilling program at Cat Creek project
catalysts.sentence: Solitario, pending permitting, is planning a limited two to four-hole drilling program at the Cat Creek project for 2026 based upon its surface geologic work from 2024 and 2025.
Solitario has only conducted very limited work on the property to date and is currently working or obtaining permits to drill the project in 2026.
